/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/test-gguf-model-data.dir/test-gguf-model-data.cpp.o" -o ../bin/test-gguf-model-data  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wayne/ubuntu-console/bin libgguf-model-data.a ../common/libcommon.a ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.8289 ../bin/libggml.so.0.9.7 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.7 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.7 ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
